privileged_info_summary: Task involves configuring the Electronics category in Magento to sort by position and manually set three product positions. The Electronics category exists and contains three synthetic products created via REST API: LAPTOP-001 (Business Laptop Pro, $999.99, position 10), PHONE-001 (Smartphone Ultra, $699.99, position 20), and HEADPHONES-001 (Wireless Headphones, $149.99, position 30). All metadata claims about category name, sort attribute, product SKUs, and expected position values are consistent with the setup and verification code.
